overall.summary_en: Risk-on: VIX at 17, credit and rates supportive
bullets_en: VIX 17 improving sharply → risk-on regime supported
Credit HYG uptrend stable → funding conditions supportive
Breadth yellow, MAGS weak → selective equity participation
bullets_ko: 크레딧 HYG 상승 → 자금 환경 양호
폭 yellow, MAGS 약세 → 선별적 참여

volatility.text_en: VIX 17 plunge signals reduced fear, risk friendly

breadth.text_en: Breadth stable but MAGS distribution flags caution
breadth.text_ko: 시장 폭 안정적이나 MAGS 분산 주의

credit.text_ko: 크레딧 안정, HYG/JNK 상승 추세 유지

rates.text_en: Rates improving, TNX at 4.445% eases pressure

commodities.text_en: Commodities stable, oil 74.48 and gold holding

sectors.text_en: Sectors mixed, SMH strong while XLE/XLY lag
